name: Elliott Kinsley
focus: Research computing • Embedded systems • Computer vision and data analysis
bio: Elliott Kinsley is a computing systems and data management staff at the Radiant Center. He is responsible for creating and managing the Radiant Center's website and various other computing systems and data management tasks. Through his work in the Bio-Mechatronics Lab at Northern Arizona University, Elliott has gained hands-on experience designing and building robotic systems, developing control mechanisms, and creating interactive engineering outreach demonstrations. Elliott uses his expertise in embedded systems and computer vision to develop robots in his free time. He is driven to push the boundaries of robotics through hands-on design, simulation, and real-world deployment.
